title: Privacy and security review for local state, backups, and mobile

acceptance_criteria.text: Review backup cryptography choices, including key derivation, salt/nonce handling, authentication failure behavior, and format-version compatibility.
Review local state storage on Windows, Android, and iOS for confidentiality expectations, corruption safety, permissions, and deletion/reset behavior.
Review import validation for malicious, oversized, malformed, or unsupported backup/state files.
Review Tauri permissions/capabilities and mobile permissions so the app asks for only what it needs.
Update SECURITY.md or privacy docs with accurate local-data, backup, diagnostics, and mobile permission statements.
Create a security/privacy audit with findings, fixes, residual risks, and release recommendation.
